# run pip-compile INSIDE the matching container so platform-specific
# wheel hashes are correct:
#
#   docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app python:3.11-slim bash -c \
#     "pip install pip-tools && \
#      pip-compile --generate-hashes --no-annotate \
#      --output-file requirements.txt requirements.in"

# Install with hash verification:
#   pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
#
# Audit for CVEs:
#   pip install pip-audit && pip-audit -r requirements.in
# ==============================================================
